allow: Bash(python3 -c "import tomllib; c = tomllib.load\(open\('config/default.toml', 'rb'\)\); print\('Config sections:', list\(c.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -c "from palintir.config import load_config; c = load_config\(\); print\('config loaded host=%s port=%s tls_cert=%r backup_dir=%s' % \(c.web.host, c.web.port, c.web.tls_cert_file, c.backup.directory\)\)")
